scripts.predeploy: npm run build && (if exist dist_gh rmdir /s /q dist_gh) && mkdir dist_gh && mkdir dist_gh\dist && copy index.html dist_gh\ && copy style.css dist_gh\ && xcopy /e /y dist dist_gh\dist
scripts.deploy: cd dist_gh && git init && git add . && git commit -m "Deploy Webtool" && git push -f https://T-Anh17@github.com/T-Anh17/eink_da14585_104x212.git master:gh-pages
